overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey depicting a character walking through an ancient Greek village at dusk. The character traverses dirt streets lined with stone buildings, passes villagers and a dog, then approaches and ascends the stairs of a large classical temple with Ionic columns, ending with a discovery notification.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Greek village street with stone houses and ruins

events.description: a brown dog crosses the path from right to left in front of the character

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the village street following other robed villagers

notable_agents.action: brown dog crossing the dirt path from right to left

entered.detail: two-story stone house with tiled roof and wooden scaffolding
ancient stone ruins with standing columns and broken pediment
tall narrow evergreen tree against the stone building
large deciduous tree with hanging branches over the ruins
distant mountain range silhouetted against the purple dusk sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow village street at dusk, flanked by stone residences and ancient ruins. A dog crosses the path ahead, and other villagers in robes walk in the same direction, some carrying lit torches.

scene_state.functional_zone: village thoroughfare with merchant carts and classical architecture

events.description: character turns slightly left to follow the curving village path

agents.ego_description: continuing through the village past wooden carts and two-story stone buildings

entered.detail: wooden wheeled cart parked on the side of the dirt street
multi-level stone residence with balcony and lit windows
large classical temple with columns visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds deeper into the village, passing wooden carts and well-preserved stone houses. The street curves gently left, revealing a large classical temple with columns in the distant center of the frame against the purple sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: sacred temple precinct approach with monumental stairs

events.description: village street opens into wide plaza approaching the temple complex
character begins ascending the stone stairs toward the temple entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching and beginning to climb the temple stairs, passing villagers on the left

notable_agents.action: two villagers standing and conversing near a wooden structure

entered.detail: large bronze or stone statue of a robed figure on a pedestal
wide stone staircase leading up to the temple entrance
flaming torches in stone holders flanking the temple stairs
tall cypress trees lining the approach to the temple

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza as the character approaches the temple complex. A large statue stands at the base of wide stone stairs flanked by lit braziers. The character begins ascending the stairs toward the columned temple entrance while two villagers converse on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance portico with monumental columns

events.description: discovery site uncovered notification appears for Argolis Banner

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep stone stairs toward the temple's columned entrance

entered.detail: triangular stone pediment atop the temple columns
carved stone frieze with figures between the columns and pediment

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the final steps of the temple stairs, passing the large statue now on the right. The camera tilts up to reveal the massive Ionic columns, decorative frieze, and pediment of the temple entrance. A discovery notification appears as the character reaches the top.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow ancient Greek village at dusk that gradually opens into the grand scale of a classical temple. It begins by following the character through a tight street flanked by stone residences and ruins, passing a dog and torch-bearing villagers. As the path curves gently left past wooden carts and houses, the view expands to reveal a large temple centered against a purple twilight sky. The scene then opens into a wide plaza where the camera approaches a statue and lit braziers before ascending a set of wide stone stairs. Finally, the camera tilts upward to reveal the massive Ionic columns and decorative pediment of the temple entrance as a discovery notification appears.
